    Index

    A C D E F G H I K L M N O P Q R S U V 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    S

    salt - Variable in class com.example.passmanager.SignUp
     
    Session - Class in com.example.passmanager
    Holds the AES key for the entire app for the duration of a user session derived from initial log in The controllers can access the key without passing it through every method call.
    Session() - Constructor for class com.example.passmanager.Session
     
    setDateOfBirth(LocalDate) - Method in class com.example.passmanager.SignUp
    Sets the user's date of birth.
    setFname(String) - Method in class com.example.passmanager.SignUp
    Sets the user's first name if the string is not empty.
    setKey(SecretKey) - Static method in class com.example.passmanager.Session
    Stores the session key after a successful login.
    setLname(String) - Method in class com.example.passmanager.SignUp
    Sets the user's last name if the string is not empty.
    setPassword(String) - Method in class com.example.passmanager.AccountInstance
    Sets new password for the associated account
    setPlatform(String) - Method in class com.example.passmanager.AccountInstance
    Sets new platform name for this account.
    setUsername(String) - Method in class com.example.passmanager.AccountInstance
    Sets new username for this account.
    showAccountPopup(AccountInstance) - Method in class com.example.passmanager.MainScreenController
    This creates the pop-up window for when an account is selected in the list view.
    signUp - Variable in class com.example.passmanager.ModelController
     
    SignUp - Class in com.example.passmanager
    Represents the primary user account created during sign-up Extends AccountInstance with personal details (first name, last name, date of birth) and the salt used to derive the user's AES key.
    SignUp(String, String, String, String, String, LocalDate, String) - Constructor for class com.example.passmanager.SignUp
    Constructs a new SignUp account with full user profile information.
    start(Stage) - Method in class com.example.passmanager.HelloApplication
    Called at runtime and loads the FXML file to be the first screen seen to which we can then interact with.
    statusLabel - Variable in class com.example.passmanager.ModelController
